summary: Backend and Frontend testing completed for Latence poetic journal app. All core features working: Journal interpretation API (GPT-5), Dream journal with interpretation, Astrology profile with birth_hour/zodiac/ascendant. Fixed ScrollView style bug in astrology modal.

minor.issue: GPT-5 API calls may timeout under load (520 errors during testing), but eventually succeed with retries

ui_bugs.issue: ScrollView child layout error - 'alignItems/justifyContent' was in style instead of contentContainerStyle. Fixed by updating modalContent style.
Dream form shows button-based type selector (Rêve/Cauchemar/Lucide/Récurrent) instead of Switch toggles as per code in dreams/index.tsx. May be a different modal/component rendering.

issues: Unexpected text node errors in View components

action_items: Fix remaining console warnings (shadow* props, pointerEvents)
Verify dream form in dreams/index.tsx matches UI - currently showing different UI than code (button types vs Switch toggles)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API correctly returns zodiac_sign and ascendant when birth_hour is provided
GPT-5 AI integration working for journal/interpret, dream/interpret, and astrology profile generation
Fixed: modalContent style had alignItems/justifyContent which should be in contentContainerStyle
seed_data_creation: Created test dreams with TEST_ prefix (TEST_Rêve récurrent, TEST_Cauchemar de chute, TEST_Rêve de vol)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is React Native Expo web. Use mobile viewport (390x844). AI calls can take 10-30s. Dream interpret uses 'dream_content' field. Fixed astrology modal ScrollView error. Profile shows zodiac_sign and ascendant cards when birth_hour provided.

POST /api/journal/interpret.details: Returns AI interpretation using GPT-5 for journal content

POST /api/astrology/profile.details: Accepts birth_hour field, returns zodiac_sign (Bélier) and ascendant (Lion) with AI interpretation

GET /api/astrology/profile/latest.details: Returns profile with zodiac_sign: {name: Bélier, element: Feu, planet: Mars}, ascendant: {name: Lion, element: Feu}

Write page AI interpretation.details: Write page loads but text input behavior inconsistent in web view (React Native web rendering)

Dreams page list.details: Shows list of dreams with + button, dream cards with type icons (recurring, nightmare)

Dream form elements.details: Form visible with Type buttons, Title, Récit, Emotions chips, Interpréter button - but UI differs from code (shows buttons instead of Switch toggles)

POST /api/dream/interpret.details: Returns Freud/Jung AI interpretation using GPT-5 for dream_content

Astrology Profile tab - zodiac card.details: Shows 'SIGNE SOLAIRE' card with Bélier, Feu - Planète Mars

Astrology Profile modal - birth_hour fie.details: Modal shows 'HEURE DE NAISSANCE (OPTIONNEL)' with HH:MM placeholder

Home page daily notification.details: Shows poetic notification based on moon phase (e.g. 'Comme la lune qui se parfait...')

ScrollView_error.root_cause: In /app/frontend/app/astrology/index.tsx line 908, modalContent style had 'alignItems: center, justifyContent: center' which React Native web doesn't allow in ScrollView's style prop
ScrollView_error.fix: Moved layout props to contentContainerStyle (already applied), removed from style object
